prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated 20V 4A-GE 'Silver Top' (engine code: 4A-GE) with individual throttle bodies (ITBs) from a Toyota AE101 Corolla, featuring a 11.5:1 compression ratio, forged internals (JE Pistons 87mm forged slugs, Eagle H-beam rods), and a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header (Toda Racing) paired with a 2.5-inch stainless exhaust system (HKS Hi-Power Spec-L) terminating in a single 110mm Burnt Tip (Sparco).

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a T50 5-speed transmission (Toyota Celica GT-S) paired to a 2-way limited-slip differential (Cusco Type-RS 1.5-way LSD) with 4.300 final gearing, upgraded half-shafts (Driveshaft Shop Stage 2), and a twin-plate ceramic clutch (Spec Stage 4+).

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (AE86-specific valving), polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension full set), Cusco front strut tower bar, and a custom 3-point rear strut brace (Battle Version). Braking system upgraded to Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers (front) with 280mm slotted rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with stainless steel braided lines (Goodridge).
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (AE86-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, custom front bumper lip (Tom’s Style), and a duckbill rear spoiler (TRD replica) in matte black. Paint scheme: original Black Limited (14) with a custom pearlescent gold flake overlay (House of Kolor Shimrin 2 Kandy Gold).

OEM+ interior with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (black Alcantara with red stitching), Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (black leather), and a custom roll cage (Battle Version 8-point bolt-in) painted in gloss black. Gauge cluster replaced with Defi Advance BF series (oil temp, oil pressure, water temp, and boost) mounted on a custom A-pillar pod.

Lighting and details: Full LED conversion (Morimoto XB35 bulbs for headlights, Philips Ultinon Pro6000 for taillights), custom JDM-spec side markers (Toyota Levin GT-Apex), and a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon) with a functional heat extractor. Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 15x8 +15 (front) and 15x9 +15 (rear) with Toyo R888R tires (195/50/15 front, 225/50/15 rear).
